{{Infobox location
| name = Red District
| introduced = The Crimson Vault
}}

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|The [[Red]] District is one of the nine colored sectors within the [[City of Light]]. Its entrance is distinguished by a door that is notably wider than all other district entrances, appearing designed to accommodate the passage of wagons. Within this area, the urban layout is characterized by a highly organized structure consisting of perfect squares.}}

== The Crimson Vault ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|The [[Red District]] door is the widest and appears built for wagons.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c13">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 13</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Alin]] has not opened the door to the [[Red District]].<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c24">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 24</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== City of Light ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">3</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|The [[Red District]] is a district in [[Elysia]].<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c7">''City of Light'', chapter 7</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Tartarus]] could not fight his way through the [[Red District]].<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c9">''City of Light'', chapter 9</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|The [[Red District]] is organized in perfect squares.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c27">''City of Light'', chapter 27</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Traveler's Gate nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:The Crimson Vault]]
[[Category:City of Light]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate locations]]
[[Category:Regions]]
